Title: Evolve: The Cosmic Shacket
Description:
Meet the Cosmic Shacket: Your Connection to Cosmic Flow. 
 Feel the magic, power, joy (euphoria), and beautiful flow (synchronicity)  of life with the Cosmic Shacket. It’s a wearable reminder: focus on the  good, get more good back from the universe. Connect to the 'Universe Soul' energy. Wear it to embrace the magic, feel your power, and attract amazing things.

MERAKI MODE ALL-WEATHER T-SHIRT
Description:
Unmask. Break free. Be real. This oversized all-weather full-sleeve tee is a bold ode to self-expression. The front screams DITCH THE LAYERS with trippy visuals of fake faces tearing apart — revealing the real you. Down below, a textured patch narrates the soul of MERAKI — doing everything with soul and zero fucks about opinions. 
 Turn around, and the back tells a story — 3D-depth trees stand tall with the quote: “The secret of life is to waste time in ways that you like.” A reminder to live wild, free, and proud. 
 Cut from utlra-smooth, luxe all-weather fabric, it feels premium yet effortless — perfect for any season, any scene. 
 Style tip: Rock it with baggy cargos, sneakers, and a chain for that chill, offbeat streetwear edge. 
 Ditch the world, not your vibe.

Title: Seventh Quarter
Description: Made from textured cotton for an authentic old-school feel, this jersey blends vintage sport aesthetics with street presence. The front reads Groove alongside the number 07 — a number for the ones who move differently, stay original, and lead without needing the spotlight. A small High Tribe emblem sits between chest and shoulder, a subtle nod to belonging to a higher circle. On the back, Top Dawg crowns the design, with an oversized 07 making sure the message is seen from every angle. It’s more than a jersey — it’s a uniform for those who know their place at the top.

Title: Rebel Club Jersey
Description: Cut from thick premium cotton, this long-sleeve quarter-zip channels the adrenaline of old-school racing culture. The front is packed with motorsport energy — Rebel Riders Club, 2025, and sponsor-style graphics that feel straight from the track. Across the back, PRO Racing League sits above a high-impact car graphic, executed in two-tone puff print for a textured, elevated finish. Designed for speed lovers and street racers at heart, it’s a statement piece that merges performance aesthetics with everyday wearability.

Title: Reflection Tee
Description: A story in black and white. The front whispers Monochrome World with the faint blur of shades of thoughts beneath it — halftone text mirroring the way our memories fade at the edges. On the back, a ghostlike figure stands blurred, marked by the words a reflection of me, cracked and cold on a stitched patch. Printed entirely in black on a crisp white base, the tee feels like wearing a moment of clarity wrapped in a haze of uncertainty.

Title: Silent Reckoning long sleeve
Description:
What's yours will find you. No matter what. A story worn on your skin — of ambition, ruin, and the stubborn will to keep moving anyway. Dark, deliberate, and unapologetic. Limited drop. No restock. 
 The Build Premium waffle-knit. All-season. Ultra-breathable. Fade-proof. Wash-proof. Holds its shape — always. Latest-gen screen print that stays sharp, wash after wash. 
 Wear It Tips Oversized with wide-leg cargos or streetwear jeans and chunky sneakers for full streetwear lore. 
 And don't forget: Once it's gone, it's gone.

Title: The Monochrome Edge Tee
Description: Cut from 100% cotton terry, this oversized tee channels street culture through a sharp monochrome gradient. The soft fade at the neckline sets a bold contrast, balanced by the structured silhouette. Finished with a signature brand patch at the hem, it embodies understated edge with refined execution.

Title: Value Protocol Long Sleeve
Description:
You are not behind. You are exactly where you need to be. 
 A reminder worn on your skin — that your existence has worth, your pace has purpose, and there is no need to rush into anything. Limited drop. No restock. 
 The Build Premium waffle-knit. All-season. Ultra-breathable. Fade-proof. Wash-proof. Holds its shape — always. Latest-gen screen print that stays sharp, wash after wash. 
 Wear It Tips Oversized with wide-leg linen trousers and clean white sneakers for that effortless soft-life fit. Or layered under an open overshirt with straight jeans — let the bird and the dragonfly do the talking. 
 And remember: Once it's gone, it's gone.
